title: Golden Globes 2026: Complete Winners List
text: The 2026 Golden Globes ceremony delivered major wins across film and television categories. In television, "Adolescence" extended its winning streak by sweeping all four limited series categories. On the drama side, "The Pitt" claimed best series. In the Best Performance by a Female Actor in a Television Series – Drama category, Rhea Seehorn won for her role in "Pluribus," competing against Kathy Bates ("Matlock"), Britt Lower ("Severance"), Helen Mirren ("Mobland"), Bella Ramsey ("The Last of Us"), and Keri Russell ("The Diplomat"). The ceremony highlighted both prestige performances and popular appeal across all categories.
